description: Test that biological hazards are identified in hazard analysis
expected_result: System identifies biological hazards such as bacteria, viruses, parasites

description: Test that chemical hazards are identified in hazard analysis
expected_result: System identifies chemical hazards such as pesticides, allergens, toxins

description: Test that physical hazards are identified in hazard analysis
expected_result: System identifies physical hazards such as metal, glass, plastic fragments
